title: Isolated
lyrics: Oh, darkened hollow, Isolated, I'm all alone. I hope I shall lead it all, Lost in my righteousness. Oh, what I hear, When your last minute's all, And you can't let go. Find a different home than you, Meditate to your mind. Have yourself not be a struggle, In the splendor of your divine. Meditate your mind, Cause I, I isolate my fear. And tell myself it's just another year. Guitar Guitar I am isolated, I'm doing this for me. Doing all this for me. I am isolated, I'm doing this for me. I'm doing this for me. Cause at every end of end of me, Are different versions of this planetary rotation. Of what you think is scary, Where fear inherits all the gory details of your past. Shows you've burned all your bridges black. I am isolated, With your island to nowhere. I am isolated, With your island to nowhere. Cause we're all high up, Isolated, I'm thinking I'm better than the cure. Gotta remember nobody's better here. You're all connected by the fear. And high up I isolate my dreams from your reality. There's no reason we should share it anymore. You just look at me like a liability and I can't stand your face anymore. I'm high up, I'm isolating from your beauty. Your deceitful canker in me.  It's not what we said it could be. High up, I'm isolating me. Yeah, I'm just wanting better by my understanding. Try to be nothing, don't even try, don't even cry. Just kill me, everything inside of me is dead already. Keep it there, suffocate my end and you know I can't be your friend. If you're so hateful and disgraceful to me. High up.
